dict.string: use of invalidated pointer 'envp' in a function call
'unsetenv' call may invalidate the environment parameter of 'main'
use of invalidated pointer 'envp' in a function call
'unsetenv' call may invalidate the environment parameter of 'main'
'putenv' call may invalidate the environment parameter of 'main'
Looping back to the head of the loop
Loop body skipped when range is empty
